# Data & Analytics

This folder contains all analysis output, databases, and data files.

## Structure

```
07_Data/
├── profiles/          # Note profile JSON files
├── correlations/      # Correlation analysis results
├── master_sheets/     # Master glossaries and axiom sheets
├── coherence.db       # Main SQLite database
├── theophysics.db     # Theophysics node database
└── duplicate_report.csv  # Duplicate analysis output
```

## Generated By

- `01_Scripts/utilities/vault_refresh.py` - Creates/updates coherence.db
- `01_Scripts/analysis/cooccurrence_analyzer.py` - Updates co-mentions
- `01_Scripts/utilities/duplicate_finder.py` - Creates duplicate_report.csv
- `01_Scripts/utilities/validation_scaffold.py` - Updates metrics

## Usage

Run the Grace Vault Manager for full analysis:

```bash
python 01_Scripts/grace_vault_manager.py --cli --vault /path/to/vault --auto
```

Or run individual scripts as needed.
